en: I'm used to thinking of the TED audience as a wonderful collection of some of the most
effective, intelligent, intellectual, savvy, worldly, and innovative people in the world,
However, I also have reason to believe that many, if not most of you, are actually tying
your shoes incorrectly. Now, I know that seems ludicrous.
I know that seems ludicrous, and believe me, I lived the same sad life until about three years ago.
And what happened to me was I bought what was for me a very expensive pair of shoes,
but those shoes came with round nylon laces, and I couldn't keep them tied.
So I went back to the store and said to the owner, I love the shoes, but I hate the laces.
He took a look and said, oh, you're tying them wrong.
